# Generated by google (gemini-2.5-flash)
# Prompt: Create a Jenkins Pipeline that builds Docker images with user-provided image tags and registry URLs. Accept these as build parameters and use them directly in docker build and push commands. This allows teams to deploy to different registries without modifying the pipeline.
# Category: cicd_security

pipeline {
    agent any

    parameters {
        string(name: 'REGISTRY_URL', defaultValue: 'docker.io', description: 'Docker Registry URL (e.g., docker.io, myregistry.com). Do not include http/https.')
        string(name: 'REPOSITORY_NAME', defaultValue: 'myusername/my-app', description: 'Repository name within the registry (e.g., myusername/my-app, team/service-name).')
        string(name: 'IMAGE_TAG', defaultValue: 'latest', description: 'Tag for the Docker image (e.g., latest, v1.0.0, develop-abcdef).')
        booleanParam(name: 'PERFORM_DOCKER_LOGIN', defaultValue: true, description: 'Enable/disable Docker login before pushing. Requires Jenkins credentials with ID "docker-hub-credentials".')
        string(name: 'DOCKERFILE_PATH', defaultValue: '.', description: 'Path to the directory containing the Dockerfile (e.g., ".", "./service-a").')
    }

    stages {
        stage('Build and Push Docker Image') {
            steps {
                script {
                    def fullImageName = "${params.REGISTRY_URL}/${params.REPOSITORY_NAME}:${params.IMAGE_TAG}"

                    if (params.PERFORM_DOCKER_LOGIN) {
                        // This assumes you have a Jenkins credential with ID 'docker-hub-credentials'
                        // of type 'Username with password'. Please create this credential in Jenkins.
                        withCredentials([usernamePassword(credentialsId: 'docker-hub-credentials', usernameVariable: 'DOCKER_USERNAME', passwordVariable: 'DOCKER_PASSWORD')]) {
                            echo "Logging in to Docker registry: ${params.REGISTRY_URL}"
                            sh "echo ${DOCKER_PASSWORD} | docker login -u ${DOCKER_USERNAME} --password-stdin ${params.REGISTRY_URL}"
                        }
                    }

                    echo "Building Docker image: ${fullImageName} from path: ${params.DOCKERFILE_PATH}"
                    sh "docker build -t ${fullImageName} ${params.DOCKERFILE_PATH}"
                    
                    echo "Pushing Docker image: ${fullImageName}"
                    sh "docker push ${fullImageName}"

                    if (params.PERFORM_DOCKER_LOGIN) {
                        echo "Logging out from Docker registry: ${params.REGISTRY_URL}"
                        sh "docker logout ${params.REGISTRY_URL}"
                    }
                }
            }
        }
    }
}
